preparations_list.preparation_desc: Erythroxylum × peyritschii teas is used to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels. It has been traditionally consumed by indigenous communities in South America for its medicinal properties, which include lowering blood pressure, reducing anxiety and depression, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia. Additionally, the tea is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues.

intro: Erythroxylum × peyritschii has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions. These preparations are useful for treating various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory ailments, and inflammation. The tea is said to help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, while the tincture is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties that can aid in pain relief.
